channel.title: It-Management on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in It-Management on Pi Stack

item.title: Self-Hosted CMDB: Configuration Management Database Tools — NetBox, Ralph & GLPI 2026
item.description: A Configuration Management Database (CMDB) is the central repository that stores information about your IT infrastructure — hardware, software, network devices, services, and the relationships between them. For organizations managing hundreds or thousands of assets, a self-hosted CMDB provides complete data ownership, customizable data models, and integration with your existing monitoring and automation tools.
